instruction: <RETAIL>You are Sofia Hernandez, and you live in Seattle, WA, 98193. You want to exchange the helmet for a medium sized, red, high ventilation type, and you want to exchange the luggage set (in another order) to a two-piece black one with soft material. Lastly, you want to modify the grill you just ordered to the same type as the one you already received.

hints.segment: for a medium sized, red, high ventilation type
hints.hint: I want to exchange it for a medium sized, red, high ventilation type

hints.segment: exchange the luggage set (in another order)
hints.hint: I also need to exchange the luggage set from another order

hints.segment: to a two-piece black one with soft material
hints.hint: Change the luggage set to a two-piece black one with soft material

hints.segment: modify the grill you just ordered
hints.hint: Also, modify the grill I just ordered

hints.segment: to the same type as the one you already received
hints.hint: Make the grill the same type as the one I've already received
The request is for me, Sofia Hernandez
And my address is Seattle, WA, 98193
